Suggested D&D Effect: Melee weapon attack +1d4

Suggested D&D Effect: Melee weapon attack +1d4

Drill: Known at creation — no training.
Suggested D&D Effect: Melee weapon attack +1d4

Drill: Known at creation — no training.
Suggested D&D Effect: Move up to 15 ft straight backward without provoking opportunity attacks

Drill: Known at creation — no training.
Suggested D&D Effect: Force melee attack reroll vs AC +2 (or disadvantage). Does not consume Reaction.
Notes / Source: Unlimited times per turn while mana lasts

Drill: Known at creation — no training.
Suggested D&D Effect: Dash up to 15 ft; melee +1d6

Drill: 100 rising cuts on a post or dummy — finish each from a low guard.
Field Goal: Land 3 upward melee hits in one fight using only normal attacks or Slant.
Suggested D&D Effect: Melee weapon attack +1d6

Drill: Quiet lunges at candle-flame distance — stop the point an inch from the mark, 50 clean reps.
Field Goal: Score a critical hit or hit a surprised foe with a melee attack.
Suggested D&D Effect: Melee attack +1d6; if you had advantage, +1d4 extra

Drill: Off-hand mirror drills: same cut with both hands for 90 minutes. End with Reaction Trial.
Field Goal: Pass the Reaction Trial (win 3 contested Initiatives or survive 5 rounds one-sword vs a tough spar).
Suggested D&D Effect: Unlocks dual-wield skill tree; may wield two one-handed swords
Notes / Source: LEVEL LOCK: Dual Blades opens at Level 3 after trial + training

Drill: Dash-in left then right arcs on two poles 15 ft apart — no stumble on the plant foot.
Field Goal: Hit the same enemy twice in one turn while holding two weapons (even without the skill).
Suggested D&D Effect: Dash 15 ft; two melee attacks with both weapons (+1d6 each)

Drill: Cut, then snap-step past the mark — leave a cloth strip fluttering. 40 clean fades.
Field Goal: Move through an enemy’s space or end a turn farther after hitting them.
Suggested D&D Effect: Melee +1d6; then move 10 ft without provoking from that target

Drill: Roof-to-ground leap cuts onto a padded mark — stick the landing 20 times.
Field Goal: Close 20+ ft and hit in the same turn twice in one adventure day.
Suggested D&D Effect: Dash up to 20 ft; melee +1d8

Drill: Carve clean V paths in sand/dirt — both edges must meet at the tip.
Field Goal: Hit one creature with two separate melee attacks in one turn.
Suggested D&D Effect: Two melee attacks (+1d4 each)

Drill: Partner swings; cross both blades and riposte — 30 successful catches.
Field Goal: Use the Help or Ready action to cover an ally, or impose disadv on an attack somehow.
Suggested D&D Effect: Impose disadvantage on one melee attack; if miss you may riposte once

Drill: Left-right waist-high doubles without over-rotating hips — 60 pairs.
Field Goal: Hit two different creatures with melee attacks in one turn.
Suggested D&D Effect: Two melee attacks (+1d4 each)

Drill: Spin-advance through hanging rings without touching them, cut the final mark.
Field Goal: Dash then hit the same target twice before your next turn ends.
Suggested D&D Effect: Move up to 10 ft; two melee attacks (+1d4 each). Second hit +1d4 if you moved.

Drill: Disarm ladder: strike a held stick from a partner’s grip 15 times safely.
Field Goal: Sunder/disarm attempt or force a foe to drop/stow a weapon.
Suggested D&D Effect: Two attacks; on hit DC 13 Str save or weapon disadvantage until end of next turn

Drill: Three-beat zigzag on a hanging rope — don’t let it stop swinging for 25 sets.
Field Goal: Deal damage to one creature three separate times in a single round.
Suggested D&D Effect: Three melee attacks (+1d4 each)

Drill: Trace a floating square of light (chalk corners) — all four edges true.
Field Goal: Survive a round adjacent to 2+ foes without being hit.
Suggested D&D Effect: Four melee attacks; +2 AC until start of next turn if all hit

Drill: Vertical square on a tall dummy — top and bottom edges equal length.
Field Goal: Drop a creature from above half HP to 0 in one turn (any attacks).
Suggested D&D Effect: Four melee attacks (+1d6 each)

Drill: Finger-spear strikes into hanging sandbags — pierce cloth without broken form, 40 reps.
Field Goal: Deal unarmed damage to an armored foe or win a grapple.
Suggested D&D Effect: Unarmed strike +2d8; ignore nonmagical armor bonus to AC

Drill: Clinches from empty hand while sword is sheathed — pin a partner’s elbow 20 times.
Field Goal: Successfully grapple or shove a creature prone.
Suggested D&D Effect: Bonus Action grapple check at advantage if you hit them this turn

Drill: Long-point thrusts through hanging rings at 10 ft — jet-engine exhale on each commit. 30 clean.
Field Goal: Defeat a significant foe with a single decisive melee attack turn.
Suggested D&D Effect: Melee attack with reach +5 ft; +2d8 damage; skip reaction until next turn

Drill: Alternating X-patterns with both blades on a spinning dummy — keep rhythm for 3 minutes.
Field Goal: Hit one target with four weapon attacks in one turn (Extra Attack + bonus etc. OK).
Suggested D&D Effect: Four dual-wield melee attacks (+1d4 each); last hit shoves 5 ft

Target: Creatures of your choice in reach
Drill: Circle a ring of posts, clipping each with alternating hands without breaking stride.
Field Goal: Damage 2+ enemies in one turn.
Suggested D&D Effect: Choose up to 3 creatures within 5 ft; one melee attack each (+1d6)

Drill: Sword-to-shoulder-to-sword chain on padded armor — full 7-beat kata, 15 flawless runs.
Field Goal: Shove a creature 10+ ft or knock it prone after damaging it.
Suggested D&D Effect: 4d8 + STR; shove target 10 ft

Drill: Twin thrusts through stacked paper screens — both blades pierce the same hole.
Field Goal: Score two critical hits in one day, or one crit while dual-wielding.
Suggested D&D Effect: Two dual thrusts at +1; +2d6 total; ignore half cover

Drill: Full 16-beat shadow kata to exhaustion — must complete under 12 seconds, twice in a day.
Field Goal: Solo a hard boss-like fight or take the killing blow on a major enemy.
Suggested D&D Effect: 6 attacks at +2; +3d8 once; vulnerable until next turn

Drill: Five descending crescents while kneeling-to-stand — ash or chalk must paint a clean fan.
Field Goal: Drop to 0 HP and survive via death saves or healing in the same fight, then win.
Suggested D&D Effect: Five dual attacks; you may spend 1 death-save success you currently have as +2d8 on the final hit (optional)

Drill: Both blades orbit the body for 60 unbroken seconds — no blade scrapes the ground.
Field Goal: Take no damage for a full round while adjacent to an enemy.
Suggested D&D Effect: Bonus Action: until start of next turn, +2 AC and Deflect costs 5 less mana once

Drill: Half-Eclipse kata (8 beats) at night only — finish with blades crossed overhead.
Field Goal: Win a duel or named rivalry fight.
Suggested D&D Effect: 4 attacks at +2; +4d8 once; next Ultimate you use before a long rest costs 10 less mana

Drill: Full 27-beat Eclipse under moonlight (or shuttered hall). One mistake = restart the count.
Field Goal: Story climax / floor-boss clear agreed with the table.
Suggested D&D Effect: 8 attacks; +6d8; speed 0 and attacks vs you have advantage until end of next turn
